title: Job Vacancies at Global Oneword Healthcare Limited
content:
Global Oneword Healthcare Limited is an indigenous Pharmaceutical Company Established June 2012. Active marketing of products started in June 2013.

Global Oneword Limited specializes in importing ,marketing ,selling and distributing ONCOLOGY drugs, OTC prescription drugs as well as other things that relates to health care and health services.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Assistant Stock Officer

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our company is seeking to hire a female Assistant Stock Officer to support the day-to-day data entry and receiving of stock in our store.
	The ideal candidate must be hardworking and ready to resume immediately.
	Applicants should reside around Coker Orile, Mile 2, Amuwo Odofin, or Ago areas of Lagos.


Responsibilities


	Maintain proper inventory control and stock management.
	Perform data entry of products into the system.
	Assist with receiving and recording incoming stock.
	Conduct stock reconciliation and stock-taking exercises.
	Ensure accurate documentation of inventory movement.


Qualifications and Experiences


	OND, HND, and BSC in Accounting or any related course.
	Minimum of 1 year of relevant work experience.
	Prior experience in a pharmaceutical store will be an added advantage.
	Knowledge of any accounting software will also be an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.



2.) Account Officer 

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and update accounting books regularly
	Record daily financial transactions such as payments, receipts, and invoices.
	Reconciling stock utilization.
	Track incoming payments from customers and follow up on outstanding balances.
	Provide necessary financial documents and explanations during internal or external audits.
	Input and manage financial data using accounting software such as Tally Prime.
	Manage and monitor petty cash transactions and maintain proper documentation
	Preparing budget forecasts.
	Administer and reconcile all bank accounts, investigating any irregularities, and taking appropriate actions.
	Generation of report with accounting software.
	Ensure efficient filing system - all documents are appropriately filed, all files are indexed and properly arranged.
	Assist the finance department with other accounting and administrative tasks as required..


Requirements


	Candidates must possess a B.Sc. or HND in a relevant field.
	Applicants should have 1–2 years of relevant work experience.
	Proficiency in the use of accounting software is required.
	Candidates residing around Surulere, Orile, Mile 2, Ijesha or Ago will have an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.



3.) Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a motivated and results-driven Medical Sales Representative to promote and sell the company’s pharmaceutical products to hospitals, pharmacies, and healthcare professionals.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for building strong customer relationships, identifying sales opportunities, and achieving set sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell the company’s pharmaceutical products to healthcare professionals and customers.
	Visit hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics to create awareness of the company’s products.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential clients.
	Identify new business opportunities and work towards achieving sales targets.
	Provide feedback on market trends, competitor activities, and customer needs.


Requirements


	HND or B.Sc. in a relevant field.
	Good communication and marketing skills.
	Strong passion and enthusiasm for sales.
	Ability to build relationships and work independently.


Application Closing Date: 18th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Medical Sales Representative” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Design UnionLimited
content:
Design Union is a real estate development group with divisions in Building design, construction, real estate development and hospitality.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Accounting Assistant

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Part-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist in maintaining financial records and processing transactions
	Prepare and reconcile bank statements and financial reports
	Support the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts
	Process accounts payable and receivable
	Assist with monthly, quarterly, and yearly closings
	Maintain proper filing of financial documents
	Support audits and ensure compliance with internal controls
	Perform other accounting and administrative duties as assigned


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree (B.Sc) in Accounting or Finance with 1 - 3 years of relevant work experience.
	1st Class or Second-Class Upper (2:1) at minimum
	Completed or in the process of completing the mandatory National Youth Service (NYSC).
	ATS or ICAN in view is a plus
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organisational abilities.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) General Manager – Hospitality

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Managing Director / CEO
Industry: Hospitality Management

Job Description


	A premier hospitality brand in Lekki / Ikate, Lagos, is seeking a highly experienced and dynamic General Manager to lead its operations.
	This is a senior leadership role with full profit-and-loss (P&L) responsibility, requiring a strategic thinker, an operational expert, and a brand ambassador.
	The ideal candidate will be a hands-on leader who can drive profitability, uphold impeccable 5-star service standards, masterfully market the brand, and inspire a high-performing team.


Detailed Role & Responsibilities
Based on the responsibilities, the candidate should possess:


	Proven Experience: Extensive experience as a General Manager or senior hotel manager in a 5-star or luxury hotel environment.
	Business Acumen: Strong financial skills with a proven track record in P&L management, budgeting, and driving profitability.
	Marketing Savvy: A modern understanding of marketing, including digital, social media, and brand positioning strategies.
	Operational Excellence: A hands-on leader who can optimize operations and ensure flawless service execution.
	Leadership: An inspirational and ethical leader who can develop staff and build a positive, high-energy team culture.
	Networking Skills: A natural ambassador, comfortable and effective in networking with HNIs, corporate leaders, and expatriates.
	Tech Proficiency: Experience with hotel ERP systems (like Hotelplus) and a commitment to process-driven management.
	Personal Attributes: Impeccable presentation, high integrity, discretion, and a passion for 5-star service.


Requisite Qualifications / Experience


	B.Sc / BA in hotel management or a related field.
	Minimum of 10 years of experience in hotel management, minimum of 3 years at the General Management level in a 5-star hotel establishment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Expatriate currently residing in Nigeria preferred.

 

3.) Receivable Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting to: Financial Controller

Responsibilities


	Daily monitoring and reporting of company-wide receivables.
	Daily follow up on all amount receivable with clients.
	Prepare all invoices to clients immediately for all completed jobs / deliveries not later than 2 working days of jobs completed / goods delivered.
	Prepare all invoices to clients promptly, as per contract terms and timing for all jobs / agreed mile stones not later than the invoice due dates
	Monthly, reconcile the Trade Receivables ledger with the General ledger control account and send an updated statement of indebtedness to customers.
	Monthly, Quarterly and at Year end, prepare and process accruals in the accounting system for all costs, invoices and bills, which have not yet been paid.
	Issues payment receipts and acknowledgements for all inflows from all debtors, subscribers, and other categories of clients.
	Preparation of company-wide liquidity forecast. That is, interfacing with all general managers to ensuring that the expected receivables for the week are properly captured in the forecast. This will be presented at weekly management meetings by the Financial Controller.


Requisite Qualifications / Experience


	B.Sc. (1st or 2nd Class Upper) in Social Sciences or Management
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in Financial Accounting
	Qualified Accountant - ACA
	Proficiency in the use of enterprise-wide accounting applications such as SAGE or SAP, Ms Office packages and PowerPoint presentations.


Required Skills / Attributes:


	Good oral and written communication skills
	Good interpersonal skills, people management and negotiating skills
	High awareness of quality issues and attention to details
	Strong sense of professionalism, integrity, and sound judgment and tact
	High level of sincerity and honesty with pragmatic and proactive approach to business
	Ability to maintain confidentiality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Alaro City Development FZC
content:
Alaro City Development FZC is an integrated, mixed-use city planned for over 2,000 hectares in the North West Quadrant of the Lekki Free Zone. Alaro City’s vision goes beyond alleviating what is a self-evident problem - that of stifling urban congestion and a dearth of quality housing and commercial property in Lagos and Africa as a whole.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Rather, we aim to help create the infrastructure - the living and working spaces, communities, schools, and hospitals - that will help sustain and accelerate Nigeria’s economic growth, meet the aspirations of Africa’s burgeoning middle classes, and serve as a catalyst for further urban development. The people in our team are multi-skilled and experts in their respective fields. They possess a unique drive, underpinned by the desire to help improve Africa’s urban development.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Driver 

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Job type: Full time (On-site)
Reporting Line: Admin Manager

Job Summary:


	We are seeking a reliable and skilled Driver to join our team at Alaro City.
	The ideal candidate will have extensive experience driving various types of vehicles including Bus, able to use google map, possess excellent navigation skills, and maintain a clean driving record.
	The Driver will ensure the safe and timely transportation of employees, visitors, and materials to stipulated locations.
	This role requires a proactive attitude, adherence to safety regulations, and a commitment to excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Transport employees, visitors, and goods safely and efficiently to their designated locations.
	Maintain cleanliness and basic maintenance of the assigned vehicles.
	Plan and follow the most efficient routes to facilitate timely arrivals.
	Conduct regular vehicle inspections and report any maintenance or repair needs.
	Adhere to all local traffic laws and regulations, ensuring a safe driving environment.
	Maintain accurate records of trips, mileage, fuel usage, and any incidents.
	Assist in loading and unloading goods as required.
	Provide excellent customer service by ensuring a comfortable travel experience for passengers.


Requirements


	High school diploma or equivalent.
	3-5 years of experience as a professional driver.
	Valid driver's license with a clean driving record.
	Knowledge of local roads, traffic laws, and safety regulations.


Skills and Competencies:


	Strong time management and organizational skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to maintain professionalism and discretion while interacting with passengers.
	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to handle unexpected situations calmly.
	Basic vehicle maintenance knowledge.


Personal Characteristics:


	Dependable and punctual.
	Strong attention to detail.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including evenings and weekends if required.
	Team player with a positive attitude.


Click here to apply online

 

2.) ICT Manager

Job Location: Epe, Lagos
Job type: Full Time (On-site)
Department: ICT

Responsibilities


	This position is responsible for the organizations’ ICT function to ensure stable, reliable, and secure ICT systems and infrastructure.


Key Result Areas:


	Oversee office networks, infrastructure and software/systems designs and implementation.
	Support end-users and ensure 100% uptime of networks, infrastructure, and systems.
	Provide technology and server hardware setup, administration, and maintenance.
	Statutory & regulatory IT compliance.
	Maintain ICT documentation in line with the various workstreams' configuration, processes, and service records.


Specific responsibilities include:


	Maintenance of IaaS, LAN Hardware, software, Telcos service management and video conferencing platforms.
	Design, setup, and management of high-level design of access control, CCTV, and other modern technical security controls systems.
	To ensure that protocols governing information confidentiality, security, and data protection, are always in place.
	To analyze and outline short-term and medium-term infrastructure and application needs for the various operations.
	Ensure awareness of ICT capabilities and ensure that all staff are regularly updated on new facilities.
	Ensure external and internal compliance with statutory, regulatory and Corporate Governance Handbook guidelines.
	Ensure that protocols governing information confidentiality, security and data protection, are in place at all times.
	Lead the introduction of new technologies in mobile devices, web and social media.
	Undertake any other duties commensurate with the position as agreed with the Management.


Requirements
Hard skills and Experience:


	Bachelor's Degree in Telecommunications / Computer Science / Computer Engineering or any other IT-related degree.
	At least 6 years of working ICT-related experience.
	Microsoft Certified Solutions Expert (MCSE).
	Must have SD-WAN Architecture, LAN/WAN, Routing, GPON and Switching experience.
	Experience in Printing services, Firewall appliances, Microsoft Office 365 administration, Endpoints Protection & Wireless technology.
	Proficient with Microsoft Teams, BlueJeans and any other collaboration tool.
	Proficient with Windows & Linux environments, SIP/VoIP, MacBook, iPad, and tablet devices.


Soft skills:


	Mature, pragmatic and flexible.
	Team player but comfortable working autonomously.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Rigorous and organized approach.
	Good attention to detail. 6. Hands-on, ready to roll up the sleeves.
	Ability to multi-task, establish priorities, and maintain organization in a rapidly changing environment.


Personal characteristics:


	High energy
	Result-oriented
	Strong work ethic
	Ability to work effectively under pressure.


Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Head of City Utilities

Job Location: Epe, Lagos
Job type: Full time (Onsite)
Reporting Line: Group Head of Utilities and Project Director
Start Date: Immediate

About the Role


	Head of Utilities is a strategic position that establishes and executes the business model and directs the strategy for city-scale utilities (water, power, gas, telecom and ICT) at Alaro City.
	A senior management position in Nigeria that works closely with the Construction & Delivery team, the Head of Utilities coordinates with Rendeavour group management and management of other Rendeavour cities.


Responsibilities
The position is responsible for all aspects of utility management:


	Financial and business strategy and oversight
	Budgeting, planning and development
	Policy development and implementation
	Operations and Maintenance
	Personnel management
	Contract preparation and implementation


Other responsibilities include:


	Lead and coordinate key engineering activities that affect Alaro City utilities.
	Provide leadership and coordination with all other groups to integrate project deliverables and plans to support procurement, construction, and commissioning activities.
	Ensure all regulatory reports and deadlines are adhered to.
	Monitor and oversee internal quality standards that are met for the operational deliverables of maintenance services.
	Prepare high-quality weekly, monthly and other periodic reports on the status of utilities at Alaro City.
	Implement and ensure enforcement of best practices, policies and procedures for the utilities businesses.
	Establish and maintain effective working relationships with other departments, regulatory
	agencies, consultants and customers.


Requirements
Hard skills and experience:


	Undergraduate degree with a minimum of 15 years of hands-on experience in an engineering setup or utility infrastructure, including but not limited to electricity generation and water treatment and distribution.
	Leadership experience in an engineering or construction firm is a major plus.
	Experience in construction, operation and maintenance of utilities infrastructure.
	Effective development/project management skills.
	Excellent business analysis skills.
	Excellent budgeting and reporting skills.


Soft skills:


	Mature, pragmatic and flexible approach, strong commercial judgment.
	Team player but comfortable working autonomously.
	Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.
	Good negotiation skills.
	Good attention to detail.
	Rigorous and organized approach.
	Hands-on, ready to roll up the sleeves.
	Quick learner and ability and pick up new skills in other related fields.


Personal characteristics:


	Strong analytical skills.
	Strategic thinker with advanced verbal/written communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to articulate and communicate Lekkcomplex infrastructure and energy concepts in simple terms clearly and succinctly.
	Exceptional project management and cross-functional leadership skills, a process-focused and keen ability to forester collaboration, influence, and build trust in a highly matrixed organisation.
	Ability to prioritise, multitask and deliver high-quality work in tight timeframes.
	Self-starter with a track record of demonstrated ability and willingness to learn, motivation anddedication to excellence.
	Entrepreneurial spirit, comfort with ambiguity, good judgement and diplomacy.
	A consummate team player with impeccable ethics and integrity.
	The ability to work outside of standard business hours is expected of this position.


Indicative Remuneration
Negotiable.

Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply
